drone_parts.note: Parts required to reach each drone level. After level 150, every single level requires parts. Drone level has no upper cap — players can exceed level 230.
strategic_notes: Drone level is one of the highest-impact power drivers in the game — prioritise parts farming
Parts are scarce in early game — avoid wasting them on non-drone upgrades
After L150, cost per level increases every 10 levels — plan resources accordingly
Higher drone level = passive stat boosts to entire squad, not just one hero
Drone upgrades provide better return on investment than most hero upgrades at mid/late game
Always check current drone level before advising on upgrade priority
drone_parts.how_to_use_for_advice: When a player provides their current drone level, use this table to calculate parts needed to reach the next milestone level (every 5 levels up to 150, then every level after). Advise whether they should prioritise drone parts farming based on their current level gap.
